title: Salter BW02763G Marblestone 24 cm Frying Pan – Non-Stick, Healthy Marble Effect Pan, PFOA-Free, Corrosion Resistant Forged Aluminium, Suitable for All Cooking Hobs, Dishwasher Safe, Stay Cool Handle
features: EASY CLEAN NON-STICK: Cook and prepare healthier meals using less oil thanks to the high-performance non-stick coating! Cook with confidence without the worry of food sticking to the pan with this grey marble interior.
SOFT-TOUCH HANDLE: We all want comfort whilst cooking and this pan has a soft touch, silicone handle that stays cool as you cook even when the heat is high.
HIGH PERFORMANCE COOKING: Whether you have gas, electric, induction or ceramic, this forged aluminium frying pan is compatible with all types of hobs and stoves.

DURABLE & LONG LASTING: Looking for a pan that offers excellent heat distribution? This frying pan heats up fast and cooks food evenly. Made from long-lasting forged aluminium, this pan is corrosion-resistant and lightweight.
PFOA & CHEMICAL FREE: Each piece of the Salter Marblestone cookware has been made with a healthy coating that is completely PFOA-free, so no chemicals get released into your food whilst cooking.
